title: SpaceX stock has cratered nearly 23% since the company joined the Nasdaq-100
summary: SpaceX's stock plunged further on Friday, a day after it aborted a test flight for its Starship rocket at the last second.

title: Anthropic in early talks with Meta to acquire compute power
summary: The talks come weeks after Anthropic announced a similar deal with Elon Musk's SpaceX to use the computing capacity at its Colossus 1 data center

title: SpaceX and the myth of independent Wall St research
summary: Buy recommendations from IPO banks underscore the limits of post-dotcom reforms

title: Where to find the Nangan region Treasure Hunt in Forza Horizon 6
body: It's the season of exotic Italian cars in Forza Horizon 6 Series 3, and this week, we're being sent to find a treasure chest near a rocket in Nangan. While tracking down this iconic rocket isn't hard, pinpointing the exact position of the Nangan region Treasure Hunt is a much harder task. Forza Horizon 6 Nangan region Treasure Hunt location Xbox Xbox This week's Festival Playlist Treasure Hunt chest is in Nangan, next to the warehouses and silos to the northeast of the Irokawa Space Center at the bottom of the map, close to the rocket launch pad. Nearby you'll find the Irokawa Space Centre Drag Strip and the Nangan Cross-Country Circuit event. Simply: Travel to the space center on the southern coast of Nangan, in the southwest of the map. Head towards the rocket and turn right at its base to find a group of plain warehouses and silos. Crash into the Treasure Hunt chest to smash it, completing the challenge. As with previous weeks, you'll earn three Festival Playlist points, 5,000 XP, and 100,000 credits. A pretty good reward for a quick trip down to the space center, wouldn't you agree? Keeping in the theme of the Series, those Festival Playlist points will go towards various new …
